titleStmt.title: SII 15.128: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 128. (B.K. No. 150 of 1926-27.) CHIKKAHANDIGOḶ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying in an enclosure called Pōlīsinavara-hittalu.
This is dated the 8th regnal year of the king, Jaya, Pushya, Monday, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkramaṇa. The Saṅkramaṇa occurred on Wednesday, December 25 of 1174 A.D.

It describes Handigoḷa and seems to record a gift of land and other gifts to a Jaina temple. The record was composed by Hiṭṭina-Sēnabōva who calls himself Anupamakavi Kāḷidāsa. Ghaṭāntikā-jinasthāna and Kamaladēvāchārya are mentioned. It was engraved by Barmōja. The record is very much damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīra syādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyāttraiḷōkya
nāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ ya namaḥ
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha kaḷacu¨rya cakrava¨rtti
rāyamurāri sōvidēvarasara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiprava¨rddhamāna mācaṁdrā
¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . kaṁ .
yaṁtire beḷvala . doḷippudanupamaṁ haṁdigoḷa . vri .
yaṁ pūdōṭadiṁ kāyu ruttippama
dāḷi dhāriṇī cakradoḷu . va .
Antu lakṣmigikkadāṇamenisida haṁdigoḷaṁ . kaṁ . Ādhipatigaḷamaḷaguṇa vidyānidhi
gaḷu [¨rvvē]da śāstrasatkriti vidyā nega ḷdaralliyaṟuvatta
nālvaru . kṣititaḷadoḷukūḍi latiśayadi ¨rdduṁ nativettudaṁnta
negaḷdaṟuvattanālvara kī¨rttilatike nutakōmaḷadi bhūnutavappa haṁdi goḷadalli negaḷda ghaṭā
ntikā jinasthānamadake pū¨rvvakrita nidhi mappa putrasantānama mukhya bāhubali
paṁḍitanallade puṭṭida¨rvāgdānakkenalke māḍisidanalliyunnatadajaina . kaṁ . nna doḷu māḍisidaṁ mērenisi negaḷda brahma
vimānada hōlu jināḷayama
bāhubali yatīśvara tiḷakaṁ . vri . sakaḷaśāstrā ḷāpa śab�ā¨rtha
tatparanudyadguṇa bhūśaṇa kamaḷadēvācā¨ryanaṁghridvayāṁbu rādhakanappa bāhu
balidēva mūlasthā dēvagaṇa dāditya nityabrataṁ . kaṁ . saṁbhava jina
nāmāṁkita mudri mire bāhubali paṁḍitanasadaṁ bhara
ta śāstrapariṇate
varaśaṁkha jināḷayādhipati yati sirimūlasaṁghada dēvagaṇakke kama
ḷadēvācā¨ryyaṁ . paramā¨rttha gamata maṇi nene tannaṁghrikamaḷa
madhupaṁ duritatama ppā bāhubali paṁḍi
ta dēvaru tāvumāḍisi Ā pesaranoppi
suvalli . svasti yamaniyama svādhyāyadhyāsadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭāṇajapa sa
mādhi śīlaguṇa saṁpannaruṁ yanādiyagrahāra haṁdigoḷadaśēśamahā rappa Aṟu
vatta nālvarubāhubali paṁḍitadēvarige
Ā basadiya [Aṣṭa] khaṁḍasphuṭita jī¨rnnōddhārakka 8 neya
jaya saṁvatsaradapuśya sōmavāradaṁduttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇadalli sa¨rvva
bādha parihāramuṁ sa¨rvvanamasyamāgi samakaṭṭinalli koṭṭa bhūmiya
sīmākramamentane dāriyiṁ mūḍalu mallikā¨rjjuna
dēvara keyiṁ teṁkalu keyiṁ paḍuvalu keyiṁbaḍagalu�mattarāṟu matta
mādhavēśvara dēvara vāgi hariva kiṟuvaḷḷadiṁ paḍuva
lu dhaṁmētada bāviyiṁ teṁkalu tōṭa matta dēvara nandādīvi
gege gāṇaṁgaḷalu soṭige yeṁṇneyako ya basa
diya keyya sīmākramamenteṁdoḍe paḍuvalu sabbe
yageyiṁ baḍaga kaggeṟeya caturāgāṭa ma
ttaru 40 Ā nālvattakkaṁ mattaroḷoṁduhaṇa khaṁḍa sphuṭita jī¨rṇnō
ddhāramaṁ māḍisi sukhadiṁdi¨rpparuĪ dha¨rmmamaṁ prati pāḷisu
varu svadha¨rmmadiṁ pratipāḷisi kōḍuṁ
koḷagumaṁ poṁnoḷu kaṭṭisi catu¨rvvēda pāragarappa brāhmaṇa¨rggu khiya ko
ṭṭa phaḷamakku midha¨rmmamanaḷidava¨rgganitumanaḷida mahāpātaka paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭi¨rva¨rśa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . vinayanidhi pēḷdanī
śāsanagabbamanalte haṁdigoḷaveraḍaṟa hiṭṭinasēnabōvanene negaḷdanupamakavi kāḷidāsa
citaviḷāsa . va . Ava[¨rgge] bālasakhi saṁmyakta ratnākaraṁ seṭṭiyamagaṁ bareda śāsana dēva
teyaroḷellaṁ śrēṣṭeyenipa peṁpina muttina saramaṁ samedaṁte śāntanū
kkaramaṁ . yintī dha¨rmamanati niścinteyiṁdaṟuvattanālvaruṁ pāḻisuti¨rppa nena
śāntaṁ samada¨rśi bāhubaliyatinātha . nareyaṁgalla ballōjana maga baḍagi ba¨rmmōjanakaṁ
ḍaraṇe . bāhubalipaṁḍitadēvara barapaṁ guḍḍe
Digital edition of SII 15.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
